title: ResearchBrief
description: Input schema for a research orchestration task. Defines the question, constraints, and planned sub-agents.

question.description: The research question to be investigated.

decision_goal.description: The decision this research is intended to support.

allowed_source_types.description: Which source types are acceptable for evidence.

agent.description: Unique identifier for this sub-agent role, e.g. 'official-docs'.

purpose.description: Why this agent is needed for the research question.

scope.description: What specific aspect this agent covers; must not overlap with other agents.

search_strategy.description: How the agent should search: keywords, source types, prioritization.
